name: Mediterranean Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop garlic, onion, and artichokes.
2. Heat the olive oil in a deep skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the garlic and onion to the skillet and saute, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the artichoke hearts, stewed tomatoes, white wine, and dried oregano to the skillet.
5. Bring the liquid to a simmer and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cook, covered, for about 15 minutes.
7. Stir in the black olive paste.
8. Place the tuna (swordfish or halibut) on top of the mixture.
9. Cover the skillet and continue cooking until the fish is cooked through, approximately 5-10 minutes.
